info.title: MedData API
info.description:
# Drug & Supplement Information API

MedData API is a developer-friendly REST API that unifies data from free government health databases into a single clean interface. It is designed for healthtech developers building apps that need reliable drug, supplement, interaction, and pricing data.

## Authentication

All endpoints (except `/health` and `/api/v1/billing/subscribe`) require an API key passed via the **`X-API-Key`** header:

```
X-API-Key: your_api_key_here
```

You can obtain an API key by subscribing through the `/api/v1/billing/subscribe` endpoint, or a free-tier key via the developer portal.

## Quick Start

1. **Get an API key** -- subscribe via `/api/v1/billing/subscribe` or sign up for a free-tier key.
2. **Make your first call:**
```
curl -H 'X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY' \
  'https://meddata.anthesia.io/api/v1/drugs/search?name=aspirin'
```
3. **Explore** -- use the interactive docs below to try every endpoint.

## Data Sources

All data comes from free, authoritative government databases:

| Source | URL | Data |
|--------|-----|------|
| openFDA | api.fda.gov | Drug labels, NDC directory, adverse events |
| RxNorm | rxnav.nlm.nih.gov | Drug naming, interactions |
| DailyMed | dailymed.nlm.nih.gov | Structured drug labels |
| FDA Orange Book | fda.gov | Generic equivalence |
| NADAC | data.medicaid.gov | Drug acquisition costs |
| NIH ODS | ods.od.nih.gov | Supplement fact sheets |

## Rate Limits

| Plan | Requests/Month | Price |
|------|---------------|-------|
| Free | 250 | $0 |
| Starter | 5,000 | $29/mo |
| Growth | 25,000 | $79/mo |
| Business | 100,000 | $199/mo |

Exceeding your limit returns a **429 Too Many Requests** response.

## Disclaimer

This API provides drug and supplement information for **informational purposes only**. It is **not medical advice**. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before making clinical decisions.

get.description: Search for drugs by brand or generic name. Results are first checked against the local database cache, then fetched from openFDA and RxNorm if no local results are found. New results are cached for future lookups. For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

parameters.name: name

schema.description: Drug name to search for (brand or generic)
schema.title: Name

parameters.description: Drug name to search for (brand or generic)

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Look up detailed drug information by RxNorm Concept Unique Identifier (RxCUI). Checks the local cache first, then fetches from RxNorm and openFDA if not found. For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

404.description: Drug not found for the given RxCUI

get.description: Look up detailed drug information by National Drug Code (NDC). Checks the local cache first, then fetches from openFDA if not found. For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

200.description: Detailed drug profile looked up by NDC

404.description: Drug not found for the given NDC code

get.summary: Check drug-drug interactions by RxCUI or name
get.description:
Submit 2-10 drugs (as RxCUI codes or drug names) and receive all known pairwise interactions. Drug names are automatically resolved to RxCUI via the RxNorm API. Results are cached for faster subsequent lookups.

**Disclaimer:** For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

interactions.description: Concurrent use of warfarin and aspirin increases the risk of bleeding.

404.description: Drug name could not be resolved to an RxCUI

422.description: Invalid input (fewer than 2 or more than 10 items)

get.description:
Submit drug names and supplement names to check for known drug-supplement interactions. Uses the NIH curated supplement database and known_interactions data.

**Disclaimer:** For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

interactions.description: Fish oil may enhance the anticoagulant effect of warfarin, increasing bleeding risk.

404.description: Supplement name could not be resolved

422.description: Invalid input (fewer than 2 or more than 10 items)

get.summary: Unified interaction check for mixed drugs and supplements
get.description:
Submit 2-10 items (drugs and/or supplements) as a comma-separated list. The endpoint auto-detects each item's type: it first attempts to resolve the name as a drug via RxNorm, and if that fails it checks the supplements database. All pairwise interactions are then checked — drug-drug via a curated major-interaction set and FDA drug labels (openFDA), drug-supplement and supplement-supplement via NIH data.

**Disclaimer:** For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

parameters.name: items

schema.description: Comma-separated item names (drugs and/or supplements, e.g. 'warfarin,Fish Oil,aspirin')
schema.title: Items

parameters.description: Comma-separated item names (drugs and/or supplements, e.g. 'warfarin,Fish Oil,aspirin')

200.description: Unified interaction check results for mixed drugs and supplements

interactions.description: Concurrent use of warfarin and aspirin increases the risk of bleeding.
Fish oil may enhance the anticoagulant effect of warfarin.

404.description: Item could not be resolved as a drug or supplement

422.description: Invalid input (fewer than 2 or more than 10 items)

get.description: Search for dietary supplements by primary name or alternate names. Results come from the local database first, falling back to the NIH Dietary Supplement Label Database when needed. For informational purposes only -- not medical advice.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)

results.name: Vitamin D
results.description: Vitamin D is a fat-soluble vitamin that helps the body absorb calcium and phosphorus.

get.description: Retrieve a detailed supplement profile by its database ID, including common dosages, known drug interactions, and evidence summaries. For informational purposes only -- not medical advice.

example.name: Vitamin D
example.description: Vitamin D is a fat-soluble vitamin that helps the body absorb calcium and phosphorus.

known_interactions.description: Orlistat may reduce absorption of vitamin D

example.evidence_summary: Strong evidence supports vitamin D supplementation for bone health.

post.description:
Search for multiple drugs by name in a single request. Each drug name counts as one query against your monthly usage quota. Results are returned as a map of drug name to search results.

**Maximum:** 100 drug names per request.

**Disclaimer:** For informational purposes only -- not medical advice.

Check interactions for multiple item pairs in a single request. Each pair is automatically classified as drug-drug, drug-supplement, or supplement-supplement. Each pair counts as one query against your monthly usage quota.

**Maximum:** 50 pairs per request.

**Disclaimer:** For informational purposes only -- not medical advice.

interactions.description: Concurrent use of aspirin and ibuprofen may reduce the cardioprotective effects of aspirin.

post.description: Creates a hosted checkout session for the chosen plan via the active payment processor (Stripe or Polar). Returns a URL to redirect the user to complete payment. Does not require authentication.

get.description: Returns the current month's API usage for the authenticated key, including plan name, monthly limit, usage count, and remaining calls.

post.description: Creates a customer portal session so the user can manage their subscription, update payment methods, or cancel. Routed through the active payment processor. Requires authentication.

400.description: No payment customer associated with this API key

post.description: Receives and processes Stripe webhook events. Verifies the Stripe-Signature header, then handles checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.deleted, and invoice.payment_failed.

schema.title: Response Stripe Webhook Webhooks Stripe Post

post.description: Receives and processes Polar.sh webhook events. Verifies the Standard-Webhooks signature, then handles order.created / subscription.created (key issuance) and subscription.canceled / subscription.revoked (deactivation).

schema.title: Response Polar Webhook Webhooks Polar Post

post.description: Issues a free-plan API key (250 requests/month). No authentication or payment required. The plaintext key is returned in the `api_key` field of the response (and also emailed as a receipt), so non-interactive callers such as agents, scripts, and MCP servers can self-onboard without reading an inbox. One key per email; rate-limited per IP. On a repeat signup for an existing email, `api_key` is null.

200.description: Free key issued (or already exists for this email)

get.description: Returns operational metrics for the API including call counts, cache hit rate, response time, and active key count. This endpoint is unauthenticated.
Returns the current health status and version of the API.

names.title: Names
names.description: List of drug names to search for (1-100 names)

limit_per_drug.title: Limit Per Drug
limit_per_drug.description: Maximum number of results per drug name (1-10)

BatchDrugRequest.title: BatchDrugRequest
BatchDrugRequest.description:
Request body for batch drug search.

Submit up to 100 drug names in a single request. Each name counts
as one query against your monthly usage quota.

results.title: Results
results.description: Map of drug name to its search results

total_drugs_found.title: Total Drugs Found
total_drugs_found.description: Number of drug names that returned at least one result

queries_used.title: Queries Used
queries_used.description: Number of API queries consumed by this batch request

BatchDrugResponse.title: BatchDrugResponse
BatchDrugResponse.description:
Response from batch drug search.

For informational purposes only -- not medical advice.

items.title: Items
items.description: The two item names that were checked

interactions.title: Interactions
interactions.description: List of interactions found between the two items

BatchInteractionPairResult.title: BatchInteractionPairResult
BatchInteractionPairResult.description:
Result for a single interaction pair within a batch response.

For informational purposes only -- not medical advice.

pairs.title: Pairs
pairs.description: List of item pairs to check for interactions (1-50 pairs, each pair must have exactly 2 items)

BatchInteractionRequest.title: BatchInteractionRequest
BatchInteractionRequest.description:
Request body for batch interaction check.

Submit up to 50 pairs of item names. Each pair counts as one query
against your monthly usage quota.

results.title: Results
results.description: Interaction results for each requested pair

total_pairs_checked.title: Total Pairs Checked
total_pairs_checked.description: Number of pairs that were checked

total_interactions_found.title: Total Interactions Found
total_interactions_found.description: Total number of interactions found across all pairs

queries_used.title: Queries Used
queries_used.description: Number of API queries consumed by this batch request

BatchInteractionResponse.title: BatchInteractionResponse
BatchInteractionResponse.description:
Response from batch interaction check.

For informational purposes only -- not medical advice.

rxcui.title: Rxcui
rxcui.description: RxNorm Concept Unique Identifier for this drug

manufacturer.title: Manufacturer
manufacturer.description: Name of the drug manufacturer or labeler

active_ingredients.title: Active Ingredients
active_ingredients.description: List of active ingredients with name and strength

fda_approval_status.title: Fda Approval Status
fda_approval_status.description: FDA approval status (e.g., Approved, Tentative Approval)

dea_schedule.title: Dea Schedule
dea_schedule.description: DEA controlled substance schedule, if applicable (e.g., CII, CIII)

ndc_codes.title: Ndc Codes
ndc_codes.description: National Drug Code identifiers associated with this drug product

DrugProfile.title: DrugProfile
DrugProfile.description:
Detailed drug profile with full labeling and regulatory information.

Extends DrugSearchResult with additional clinical and regulatory fields.
Data is aggregated from openFDA, RxNorm, and DailyMed.
For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

results.title: Results
results.description: List of drugs matching the search query

total_count.title: Total Count
total_count.description: Total number of results matching the query

DrugSearchResponse.title: DrugSearchResponse
DrugSearchResponse.description: Paginated response wrapper for drug search results.

rxcui.title: Rxcui
rxcui.description: RxNorm Concept Unique Identifier for this drug

manufacturer.title: Manufacturer
manufacturer.description: Name of the drug manufacturer or labeler

DrugSearchResult.title: DrugSearchResult
DrugSearchResult.description:
A single drug result returned from a search query.

Data is aggregated from openFDA, RxNorm, and DailyMed.
For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong
examples: No drug found with the given RxCUI

status_code.title: Status Code
status_code.description: HTTP status code for the error

request_id.title: Request Id
request_id.description: Unique identifier for this request, useful for support inquiries

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description:
Standard error response returned by all endpoints on failure.

All error responses follow this consistent structure to make client-side
error handling straightforward.

item_count.title: Item Count
item_count.description: Number of items that were submitted for interaction checking

interactions.title: Interactions
interactions.description: List of known interactions found among the submitted items

checked_at.title: Checked At
checked_at.description: Timestamp when the interaction check was performed

InteractionCheckResponse.title: InteractionCheckResponse
InteractionCheckResponse.description:
Response from the interaction checker endpoint.

Returns all known pairwise interactions among the submitted items.
For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

item_1_name.title: Item 1 Name
item_1_name.description: Name of the first item in the interaction pair

item_1_rxcui.title: Item 1 Rxcui
item_1_rxcui.description: RxCUI of the first item, if it is a drug

item_1_type.title: Item 1 Type
item_1_type.description: Whether the first item is a drug or supplement

item_2_name.title: Item 2 Name
item_2_name.description: Name of the second item in the interaction pair

item_2_rxcui.title: Item 2 Rxcui
item_2_rxcui.description: RxCUI of the second item, if it is a drug

item_2_type.title: Item 2 Type
item_2_type.description: Whether the second item is a drug or supplement

severity.title: Severity
severity.description: Clinical severity level: major, moderate, minor, or unknown

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable description of the interaction and its clinical significance
examples: Concurrent use of warfarin and aspirin increases the risk of bleeding. Monitor closely if co-administration is necessary.

source.title: Source
source.description: Data source that reported this interaction

InteractionPair.title: InteractionPair
InteractionPair.description:
A single interaction between two items (drugs and/or supplements).

Severity levels follow standard clinical classifications:
major, moderate, minor, or unknown.
For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

portal_url.title: Portal Url
portal_url.description: Customer portal URL — redirect the user here

PortalResponse.title: PortalResponse
PortalResponse.description: Response containing the customer portal URL.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address to send the free API key to

SignupRequest.title: SignupRequest
SignupRequest.description: Request body for a free-tier signup.

message.title: Message
examples: Your free API key is on its way to dev@example.com.

api_key.title: Api Key
api_key.description: The newly issued plaintext API key. Returned only on first issuance so non-interactive callers (agents, scripts, MCP servers) can use it immediately without waiting for the email. Null when a key already exists for this email; in that case retrieve the existing key from the original email or contact support.

plan.title: Plan
plan.description: Plan name: starter, growth, or business

SubscribeRequest.title: SubscribeRequest
SubscribeRequest.description: Request body for creating a new subscription.

checkout_url.title: Checkout Url
checkout_url.description: Hosted checkout URL — redirect the user here. The host depends on the configured payment processor (checkout.stripe.com or polar.sh).

SubscribeResponse.title: SubscribeResponse
SubscribeResponse.description: Response containing the hosted checkout URL.

alternate_names.title: Alternate Names
alternate_names.description: Other common names or synonyms for this supplement

description.title: Description
description.description: Brief description of the supplement and its primary uses
examples: Vitamin D is a fat-soluble vitamin that helps the body absorb calcium and phosphorus, essential for bone health.

common_dosages.title: Common Dosages
common_dosages.description: Typical dosage ranges by population group

known_interactions.title: Known Interactions
known_interactions.description: Known interactions with drugs or other supplements

examples.description: Orlistat may reduce absorption of vitamin D

evidence_summary.title: Evidence Summary
evidence_summary.description: Brief summary of the clinical evidence for this supplement
examples: Strong evidence supports vitamin D supplementation for bone health. Evidence for cancer prevention and immune function is mixed and ongoing.

source_url.title: Source Url
source_url.description: URL to the original NIH ODS fact sheet or source page

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: Timestamp when this supplement record was last updated

SupplementProfile.title: SupplementProfile
SupplementProfile.description:
Detailed supplement profile with dosage, interaction, and evidence data.

Extends SupplementSearchResult with clinical detail sourced from the NIH
Office of Dietary Supplements.
For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

results.title: Results
results.description: List of supplements matching the search query

total_count.title: Total Count
total_count.description: Total number of results matching the query

SupplementSearchResponse.title: SupplementSearchResponse
SupplementSearchResponse.description: Paginated response wrapper for supplement search results.

alternate_names.title: Alternate Names
alternate_names.description: Other common names or synonyms for this supplement

description.title: Description
description.description: Brief description of the supplement and its primary uses
examples: Vitamin D is a fat-soluble vitamin that helps the body absorb calcium and phosphorus, essential for bone health.

SupplementSearchResult.title: SupplementSearchResult
SupplementSearchResult.description:
A single supplement result returned from a search query.

Data is sourced from the NIH Office of Dietary Supplements.
For informational purposes only — not medical advice.

current_usage.title: Current Usage
current_usage.description: Requests used so far this month

UsageResponse.title: UsageResponse
UsageResponse.description: Current month API usage for the authenticated key.

APIKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
APIKeyHeader.description: API key for authentication. Include as X-API-Key header.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Health checks and system status. No authentication required.

tags.name: Drugs
tags.description: Search and look up drug information by name, RxCUI, or NDC code. Data is aggregated from openFDA, RxNorm, and DailyMed. Requires authentication via `X-API-Key` header.

tags.name: Supplements
tags.description: Search and look up dietary supplement information. Data is sourced from the NIH Office of Dietary Supplements. Requires authentication via `X-API-Key` header.

tags.name: Interactions
tags.description: Check drug-drug, drug-supplement, and supplement-supplement interactions. Drug-drug data is sourced from FDA structured product labels (openFDA) plus a curated set of major interactions; drug-supplement data from the NIH. Requires authentication via `X-API-Key` header.

tags.name: Batch
tags.description: Batch endpoints for searching multiple drugs or checking multiple interaction pairs in a single request. Each item in the batch counts as a separate query against your monthly usage quota. Requires authentication via `X-API-Key` header.

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Manage subscriptions, view usage, and access the customer portal (via the active payment processor — Stripe or Polar). The subscribe endpoint is public; usage and portal require authentication.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Payment processor webhook receivers (Stripe and Polar). Not intended for direct use by API consumers.
